name: Vichyssoise II
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 2 1/2-quart to 3-quart, heat-resistant,
non-metallic casserole, melt butter in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
Add leeks and onions. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven an additional 3 minutes.
2. Add diced potatoes and chicken broth to butter-leek mixture. Heat, covered,
15 to 18 minutes or until potatoes are very tender.
3. Press the mixture through a sieve or electric blender until smooth.
4. Return the mixture to the heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole and gradually stir in cream.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
5. Heat, covered, for 4 minutes or until soup is very hot.
